message: Add long options for release notes command

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: Add long option versions for release notes command
+type: feature
+authors:
+- mavam
+- claude
+components:
+- cli
+created: 2025-12-15T09:39:27.678995Z
+---
+
+The `release notes` command now accepts long option versions `--markdown` and `--json` in addition to the short `-m` and `-j` flags, improving command discoverability and consistency with other CLI tools.

@@ -3233,13 +3233,15 @@ def render_release_notes(
 @click.argument("identifier")
 @click.option(
     "-m",
+    "--markdown",
     "format_choice",
     flag_value="markdown",
     default="markdown",
     help="Render notes as Markdown (default).",
 )
 @click.option(
     "-j",
+    "--json",
     "format_choice",
     flag_value="json",
     help="Render notes as JSON.",
